title: Graduate School of Social Sciences Mission and Vision
content:
Graduate School of Social Sciences Mission and Vision

Mission

The mission of Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Sciences is to equip its students with the knowledge and talent they will need in a global society that is rapidly progressing with technological, social, cultural and universal change. In addition, it is to train experts and scientists who are compatible with R&D focuses, adhere to ethical values, creative, universal, social science can be directed.

Vision

To become a respected and preferred educational and research institution in the field of social sciences in our country and in the world, in cooperation with national and international graduate-schools. By adhering to the core values of our university, an institutional structure is aimed in which all our staff are identified with the vision of our university. Contemporary people and dominate the people-oriented technology, high quality education, training, research and developing application programs in Turkey and at the same time our target is provided education and training in European union and world standards.
